name: Marco Rubio
title: U.S. Secretary of State
bio: American politician and attorney serving as the 72nd United States Secretary of State. Previously served as a United States Senator from Florida.
faith: Rubio has been open about his Christian faith journey, having been baptized as a Mormon, returned to Catholicism, attended a Southern Baptist church, and settled back in the Catholic Church. He frequently posts Bible verses on social media and has spoken about the importance of faith.

sources.title: Marco Rubio — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his faith journey through multiple denominations

tagline: A senator and Secretary of State who shares Scripture daily
